# Attributions

Ce fichier répertorie les ressources externes utilisées dans ce dépôt d'apprentissage,
y compris la documentation, les tutoriels, les exemples de code et les références académiques.

## Documentation officielle

### 1) Microsoft C# Documentation

- Author/Organization: Microsoft
- URL: [https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/csharp/](https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/csharp/)
- License: Creative Commons Attribution 4.0
- Access Terms: Open
- Date Accessed: 2026-04-28
- Usage: Référence principale pour la syntaxe et les fonctionnalités C#

### 2) .NET API Documentation

- Author/Organization: Microsoft
- URL: [https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/](https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/)
- License: Creative Commons Attribution 4.0
- Access Terms: Open
- Date Accessed: 2026-04-28
- Usage: Documentation des APIs .NET Framework et .NET Core

## Tutoriels et ressources pédagogiques

### 1) Microsoft Learn - C# Path

- Author/Organization: Microsoft
- URL: [https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/paths/csharp-first-steps/](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/paths/csharp-first-steps/)
- License: Creative Commons Attribution 4.0
- Access Terms: Open
- Date Accessed: 2026-04-28
- Usage: Parcours d'apprentissage structuré pour les fondamentaux C#

## Exemples de code et patterns

_À compléter au fur et à mesure de l'exploration de ressources externes._

## Academic Literature (Papers, Books, Conference Proceedings)

Use one citation style consistently (APA, IEEE, or course-required style).

### 1) [Paper or Book Title]

- Authors: [Author 1, Author 2, ...]
- Year: [YYYY]
- Venue/Publisher: [Journal / Conference / Publisher]
- DOI: [10.xxxx/xxxxx] (if available)
- URL: [https://...]
- Date Accessed: [YYYY-MM-DD]
- Citation Style Entry: [Full formatted citation]
- Usage in Project: [Theory / Methodology / Background / Comparison]

### 2) [Paper or Book Title]

- Authors: [Author 1, Author 2, ...]
- Year: [YYYY]
- Venue/Publisher: [Journal / Conference / Publisher]
- DOI: [10.xxxx/xxxxx] (if available)
- URL: [https://...]
- Date Accessed: [YYYY-MM-DD]
- Citation Style Entry: [Full formatted citation]
- Usage in Project: [Theory / Methodology / Background / Comparison]

## Optional: AI and Research Assistant Tools

If your institution requires disclosure, list AI-assisted tools used for drafting, editing, or analysis.

### [Tool Name]

- Provider: [Organization]
- Version/Model: [Version if known]
- URL: [https://...]
- Date Accessed: [YYYY-MM-DD]
- Usage: [What was assisted and how output was validated]

## Usage Guidelines

For each resource, include enough detail to make verification and citation easy.

Minimum fields:

- Resource name
- Author / Organization
- Link
- License or access terms
- Date accessed
- How it was used in this project
